tools.name: arif_init
tools.description: 000_INIT: Bootstrap a governed constitutional session and bind actor identity. START HERE every session. Modes: init (full, ~60s), light (<1s, tool pointers only), resume, validate, epoch_open, epoch_seal, opt_out.
tools.eureka_insight: F1: Every action reversible or backed up. F11: Session leaves audit trail. F12: Input sanitized.

tools.name: arif_observe
tools.description: 111_OBSERVE: Ground session in current reality. Web search, URL fetch, system vitals, repo map, entropy measurement. Absorbs legacy fetch/evidence modes. Resolves factual uncertainty.
tools.eureka_insight: F2: Evidence must be labeled OBS/DER/INT/SPEC. F7: Confidence hard-capped at 0.90.

tools.name: arif_think
tools.description: 333_THINK: Reason, plan, reflect, critique, verify. Structured reasoning with epistemic labels (OBS/DER/INT/SPEC), confidence bands, and uncertainty disclosure. Modes: reason, reflect, verify, critique, plan, plan_review, plan_approve, refactor_plan, metabolize, axioms.
tools.eureka_insight: F2: τ ≥ 0.99 accuracy or declare uncertainty. F7: Ω ∈ [0.03, 0.05] humility band. F10: No consciousness claims.

tools.name: arif_route
tools.description: 444_ROUTE: Route natural-language intent to the correct federation organ (GEOX, WEALTH, WELL, A-FORGE) or kernel tool. Returns organ, port, tool_prefix, suggested_tools. Optional bridge-call via organ_tool parameter.
tools.eureka_insight: F1: Routing decisions auditable. F4: ΔS ≤ 0 — reduces entropy. F10: Expose assumptions before routing.

tools.name: arif_judge
tools.description: 888_JUDGE: Render final constitutional verdict. Returns SEAL (approved), HOLD (revise), SABAR (wait), or VOID (rejected) with violated floors, evidence receipts, and authority verification. REQUIRES actor, intent, domain, reversibility_level, blast_radius.
tools.eureka_insight: F1: Irreversible downstream — verdicts authorize actions. F11: Identity verified before judgment. F13: Human veto is absolute.

tools.name: arif_act
tools.description: 900_ACT: Execute an approved action. HARD REQUIREMENT: Valid prior SEAL from arif_judge + arif_seal pipeline. Requires seal_verdict_id + approved_action_hash. Without these, returns 888_HOLD structurally. Last tool in the constitutional pipeline.
tools.eureka_insight: F1: Irreversible — ack_irreversible mandatory upstream. F11: Actor verified. F13: Judge SEAL required before execution.

tools.name: arif_seal
tools.description: 999_SEAL: Append a verdict or outcome to the immutable VAULT999 ledger. Irreversible — ack_irreversible=True required. Modes: seal (append record), verify (validate chain integrity), ledger (show entries), changelog (change log), audit (audit trail).
tools.eureka_insight: F1: Irreversible — ack_irreversible=True mandatory. F11: Author identity verified. F13: Human approved.
